asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline bundle_kb from clean build to compare optimizations.
asi.notes: js_kb/css_kb reported as 0 due to script bug; fix next.

description: replace recharts with custom svg chart (initial attempt)

asi.hypothesis: Removing recharts and replacing chart with custom SVG should reduce bundle size significantly.
asi.rollback_reason: Build failed because Vite manualChunks still referenced recharts.
asi.next_action_hint: Remove recharts manualChunks entry from vite.config.js and rerun.

description: replace recharts with custom SVG chart and remove recharts chunk

asi.hypothesis: Removing recharts and replacing chart with lightweight SVG should cut bundle size.
asi.impact: bundle_kb dropped from 587 to 255; js_kb now 243 and css_kb 12.
asi.notes: Added custom SVG chart with basic tooltip; removed recharts dependency and manualChunks.

description: remove react-router and use lightweight manual navigation

asi.hypothesis: Dropping react-router and using a minimal history-based router will reduce JS bundle size.
asi.impact: bundle_kb decreased from 255 to 222; js_kb now 209.
asi.notes: App now manages path + state manually; LandingPage/InputForm/ResultsPage accept props instead of router hooks.
